case_title: SAMANTHA HOGG ET AL VS. FENTRESS HILL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOGG, SAMANTHA GRANDI, ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILL, FENTRESS $5,237.13 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,312.13, (SEE JUDGMENT FOR FULL DETAILS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-01-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAMANTHA HOGG AND ADAM GRANDI ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT FENTRESS HILL IS PRESENT. THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE A VALID PROOF OF SERIVCE ON FILE. DEFENDANT STATED HE RECEIVED THE CLAIM AT HIS HOME. DEFENDANT DOES NOT TIME FOR SERVICE AND STATED HE WOULD LIKE TO FILE A COUNTER CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2024 - PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2024 BY CURTIS KARNOW. PLAINTIFFSS SAMANTHA HOGG AND ADAM GRANDI ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT FENTRESS HILL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (611)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2024 - DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2024 BY CURTIS KARNOW. CROSS-COMPLAINANT FENTRESS HILL IS PRESENT. CROSS-DEFENDANTS SAMANTHA HOGG AND ADAM GRANDI ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (611)
